Title: Shallow Bowl
Medium:
Ding ware, with low foot and foliate rim, fitted with metal band. Decoration molded in relief: center, lotus on waves, elaborate design on sides of ducks swimming on combed waves among lotus & other water plants, outer border of key fret.

Fine white porcelain. Ivory white glaze, worn in places, soft in texture, with gummy drops outside, and within footrim; mouth rim bare.
